warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Practice the V2 (verb-second) word order rule in main clauses, especially after fronted adverbs like 'sicherlich', 'vielleicht', or 'dann', combined with accusative adjective endings (e.g. 'den ägyptischen Teil').
speaking_prompt: You arrive at your hotel near the Ringstraße after a long flight. Herr Fischer greets you at the front desk. Check in, ask about the WiFi, and confirm your checkout date.
carry_forward_errors: wir schauen uns auch das Museum an / wir gehen auch durch das Museum (was: wir spazieren auch durch das Museum) — session 2026-05-01
